# Bilag

[Samtykkedokument](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WSwm5VS4rqMGf88sh83JyY22WKnNq_FZ/view?usp=sharing).

[Skriftlig deltagerindformation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16lk3qCFOK0lUSFcKux80OKlYnl0a97NZ/view?usp=sharing).


[Tilsagn fra Styrelsen for Patientsikkerhed](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16lk3qCFOK0lUSFcKux80OKlYnl0a97NZ/view?usp=sharing).

[Skriftlig deltagerindformation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16lk3qCFOK0lUSFcKux80OKlYnl0a97NZ/view?usp=sharing).
[Skriftlig deltagerindformation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16lk3qCFOK0lUSFcKux80OKlYnl0a97NZ/view?usp=sharing).


::: text-center
![](/images/rm-logo.png){width=200px}
:::
